slides.title: Eat out *without the guilt*.
slides.sub: Restaurants don't have to wreck your week. A few moves keep you on track.

slides.title: Check the menu first
slides.body: Decide before you're hungry. *Pick your meal* on the way, not at the table.

slides.title: Lead with the protein
slides.body: Order a *protein and veg* base, then add from there — not from the bread basket.

slides.title: Box half up front
slides.body: Portions are huge. *Box half* before you start and dinner becomes tomorrow's lunch.

slides.title: Watch the liquid calories
slides.body: Cocktails and sodas *add up fast*. Alternate with water and you barely notice.

slides.title: Enjoy it, then move on
slides.body: One meal won't undo a week. *Enjoy it fully* and get right back to normal.

slides.title: Eat out. *Stay on track.*
slides.body: Snap the meal and Vibe Health estimates it — so a night out is a data point, not a derailment.

caption:
Eating out isn't the problem. Going in with no plan is. 🍝

Check the menu first, lead with protein, box half, watch the drinks — then actually enjoy it. Save this before your next dinner. 🔖

Snap the meal and Vibe Health estimates it for you → link in bio.
youtube_title: How to Eat Out Without Wrecking Your Progress
